researchTopic: Audit deep-loop-runtime peer-runtime skill against current sk-doc templates and surface any runtime logic, dependency, or consumer surface NOT captured in spec.md or findings/audit-findings.jsonl. Focus on: (1) missing test coverage for lib/deep-loop/ (10 TS modules), lib/coverage-graph/ (3 TS modules), lib/council/ (5 cjs modules), scripts/ (4 .cjs + cli-guards.cjs); (2) undocumented integration points beyond deep-review + deep-research + deep-ai-council in references/integration_points.md; (3) stale references in references/, feature_catalog/, manual_testing_playbook/; (4) inconsistencies between SKILL.md, README.md (rewritten in phase 3), changelog/v1.1.0.0.md, and graph-metadata.json. Per ADR-002, executor is cli-devin SWE-1.6. Per ADR-004 no-code-edit boundary, code-class findings are LOG_ONLY for follow-on packets.

convergenceState.stopReasonCaveat: Canonical soft-convergence trigger (newInfoRatio < 0.05 for 2 consecutive iters) was structurally unreachable on this audit trajectory because dense documentation surface guaranteed novel findings whenever each iter targeted a sufficiently bespoke focus. All 9 strategy.md §4 named focus areas closed across iters 1-9. Iter 10 = mandated synthesis pass.
